title: Eli Lilly to acquire Boston biotech Kelonia Therapy in $7 billion deal
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Business The purchase marks the pharmaceutical giant’s latest multibillion-dollar move to expand its footprint in Massachusetts.

title: Paul Pierce roasts 76ers, questions whether series is worth his time
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Boston Celtics "When I saw Sixers-Celtics I was like - I usually go to the Celtics' first round, but I really didn't want to waste that trip because I know.

" Paul Pierce Danielle Parhizkaran/Globe Staff The Celtics and 76ers have met in the playoffs more than any other pair of teams in NBA history, but the last time Philadelphia beat Boston in a series was 44 years ago in the 1982 Eastern Conference Finals.
Boston eliminated Philadelphia twice during Paul Pierce’s career.

title: Healey just signed a major overhaul to the state’s Cannabis Control Commission. Here’s what to know.
author: Beth Treffeisen

title: Sharon Lokedi notches 2nd-straight Boston Marathon win
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Boston Marathon In a finish line interview, Lokedi said a little girl's shout of "you've got this, ladies!
" fueled her from the sidelines.
Sharon Lokedi of Kenya celebrates after winning the women's division of the Boston Marathon, Monday, April 20, 2026.

title: 13 years after David Ortiz’s iconic speech, Alex Cora reflects on Patriots Day at Fenway Park
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Red Sox "Stuff like that can unite people.
” David Ortiz's speech just five days after the Boston Marathon bombing resonated with a grieving city.

title: Americans sweep handcycling titles at Boston Marathon
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Boston Marathon PA native Zachary Stinson and New England resident Edie Perkins won the men’s and women’s handcycling titles, respectively.
Canada’s May Lim and Julien Pinsonneault won the duo division.
Participants in the handcycling division take their place in front of the starting line in Hopkinton for the Boston Marathon.

title: He’s running Boston to continue his family’s work at The Hoyt Foundation
author: Kelly Chan
bullets: Why I'm Running "My hope is to give the feeling that a person’s disability feels like it disappears through my family’s foundation.
" By Kelly Chan April 20, 2026 | 12:05 PM 1 minute to read In our “Why I’m Running” series, Boston Marathon athletes share what’s inspiring them to make the 26.
2-mile trek from Hopkinton to Boston.

title: John Korir wins the 2026 Boston Marathon in a record time
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Boston Marathon Korir matched his 2025 triumph with yet another dominant display, breaking the previous course record of Geoffrey Mutai from 2011.
John Korir wins the 2026 Boston Marathon in a new course record time of 2:01:52.
Jessica Rinaldi/Globe Staff By Hayden Bird April 20, 2026 | 11:48 AM 1 minute to read For the second year in a row, John Korir survived an unsteady start to win the Boston Marathon men’s division.
